---
title: "About Homer"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: images/Homer_MPC.jpeg
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  image-alt: "Homer's face"
  links:
    - icon: facebook
      text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61556987980351
    - icon: email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:homerhanumat@gmail.com
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Hello, I'm Homer White.  More about me soon.

:::
